theme: Brand & Positioning — homepage manifesto re-frame (Stage-5 build cycle 1)
change_summary: Re-framed the homepage hero from docs-first ('An open standard for context and knowledge', no h1) to the ratified Direction-A manifesto: NEW <h1> 'Context is our shared inheritance.' + supporting ethos paragraph + the two ratified CTAs ('Explore the network' -> /vaults, 'Read the standard' -> /reference/specification). Trust line re-cast to 'Open source on GitHub · MIT · built on the Lattice Protocol'. Page <title>/description re-framed to the network/shared-context positioning. Fixed the stale adna.dev siteUrl fallback -> adna.network. Added .hero-headline (clamp display type, text-wrap:balance) + re-styled .hero-lead as supporting paragraph.

doctrine_compliance.above_fold_one_focus: headline is the focus (words-as-focus per Hermes); banner retained pending cycle-2 Visual-Designer call
doctrine_compliance.dial: ~55/45 (ratified); revolutionary via the inheritance claim + verbs, restraint via measured language + named substrate, zero marketing adjectives

validation.astro_build: PASS — 161 pages built in 5.28s, 0 errors (Gate 1 schema + Gate 2 MDX)
validation.lighthouse: deferred to E1 decadal close (cycle 10) per MAX-III Reviewer-Lens-Pass cadence
validation.persona_qa: deferred to E1 decadal Reviewer Lens Pass (full 30-persona bench; mandatory Brand Strategist + Motion Designer + Design Critic + Visual Designer + Newcomer + Movement Skeptic)

carry_forward: cycle 2: brand-system v3 deltas + banner-vs-words Visual-Designer decision (keep/dim/replace the hero banner)
cycles 3-8: sections 1-5 (definition+diagram / living registry / build-share-govern / standard-underneath / join+public-good-tease)
cycle 9: breadth-first nav re-frame + responsive + motion pass
cycle 10: E1 decadal AAR + 30-persona Reviewer Lens Pass + Lighthouse/Playwright
notes: First ecosystem BUILD cycle. Homepage is now partially re-framed: NEW manifesto hero live; body sections (How it Works / Who Uses / The Standard) still the pre-pivot framing — re-themed in cycles 3-8. Honest interim state.
